name: ollama-codex
description: Configure Codex App to use Ollama for local and Ollama Cloud models.

interface.shortDescription: Use local and Ollama Cloud models in Codex App.
interface.longDescription: Use Ollama for Codex to configure Codex App through Ollama's official OpenAI-compatible endpoint. The plugin checks local readiness, runs `ollama launch codex-app`, switches directly to a chosen local or Ollama Cloud model, and restores the previous Codex App profile with `ollama launch codex-app --restore`. Codex App support requires Ollama v0.24.0 or newer; model selections persist for future Codex App launches; Ollama saves backups under `~/.ollama/backup/codex-app/`; and the Codex CLI profile managed by `ollama launch codex` stays separate. Codex App features such as the built-in browser and review mode continue to work normally after setup.
defaultPrompt: Set up Codex App with Ollama
Switch Codex App to an Ollama model
